text:
In the first scene, among the empty seats and quiet conversations, I sense anticipation. The energy is suspended, as if ideas are hanging in the air, waiting for the gathering to begin. I feel curious, slightly anxious—wondering what insights or encounters will take shape here.

In the second scene, immersed in colors and words on the wall, my mind stirs with wonder. Here, creativity, discovery, and knowledge intertwine. I feel inspired and contemplative, eager to explore—reminded of how human ingenuity always seeks to connect and illuminate the unknown.
